payload.comment: Identifier to uniquely specify a patient.

payload.comment: Numeric value to express the degree of abnormality of cancer cells, a measure of differentiation and aggressiveness.

payload.value: Numeric value to express the degree of abnormality of cancer cells, a measure of differentiation and aggressiveness.

payload.comment: Text term that describes the anatomic site of the tumor or disease.

payload.value: Text term that describes the anatomic site of the tumor or disease.

payload.comment: The type of sample (i.e., normal, primary, met, recurrence).

payload.value: The type of sample (i.e., normal, primary, met, recurrence).

payload.comment: MSI Score reported by MANTIS. The suggested thresholds are MSI: >0.6, Indeterminate: 0.4-0.6 and MSS: <0.4.

payload.value: MSI Score reported by MANTIS. The suggested thresholds are MSI: >0.6, Indeterminate: 0.4-0.6 and MSS: <0.4.

payload.comment: MSI Score reported by MSIsensor. The suggested thresholds are MSI: >10, Indeterminate: 4-10 and MSS: <10.

payload.value: MSI Score reported by MSIsensor. The suggested thresholds are MSI: >10, Indeterminate: 4-10 and MSS: <10.

payload.comment: A Tissue Source Site collects samples (tissue, cell, or blood) and cliincal metadata which are then sent to tha Biospecimen Core Resource.

payload.value: A Tissue Source Site collects samples (tissue, cell, or blood) and cliincal metadata which are then sent to tha Biospecimen Core Resource.

payload.comment: The sum of unbalanced somatic chromosomal breaks per tumor sample (Lakbir et al., Eur J Cancer 2022; Data from new manuscript in progress)

payload.value: The sum of unbalanced somatic chromosomal breaks per tumor sample (Lakbir et al., Eur J Cancer 2022; Data from new manuscript in progress)

values.value: Milan - Italy, Fondazione IRCCS Instituto Neuroligico C. Besta
